lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there, What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: *yawn*...oh, hello...*yawn* I'm sorry! I'm just so tired! I haven't slept in a week!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why can't you sleep, what's wrong?

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: It's brother Androe's son! With his constant: Waaaaaah! Waaaaaaaaah! Androe said it's natural, but it's so annoying!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose that's what kids do.

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: He was fine, up until last week! Thieves broke in! They stole his favourite sleeping blanket!

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: Now he won't rest until it's returned... ...and that means neither can I!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I help at all?

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: Please do. We won't be able to help you as we are peaceful men but we would be grateful for your help!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where are they?

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: They hide in a secret cave in the forest. It's hidden under a ring of stones. Please, bring back the blanket!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that! I hope you find his blanket.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry! I'm too busy to hear your problems!

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: Dum dee do la la! *hiccup* That was some party!

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: How can that be? Go check again!

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: Spot on!

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Brother Omad
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.
